positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_problem
% SZS output start Proof for pos_problem
7. ! [X0] : (~jumps(X0) => can_block(michael,X0)) [input(axiom)]
8. ~can_block(michael,windy) [input(axiom)]
9. ! [X0] : (jumps(X0) => great_shooter(X0)) [input(axiom)]
10. great_shooter(windy) [input(conjecture)]
11. ~great_shooter(windy) [negated conjecture 10]
12. ~great_shooter(windy) [flattening 11]
19. ! [X0] : (can_block(michael,X0) | jumps(X0)) [ennf transformation 7]
20. ! [X0] : (great_shooter(X0) | ~jumps(X0)) [ennf transformation 9]
27. can_block(michael,X0) | jumps(X0) [cnf transformation 19]
28. ~can_block(michael,windy) [cnf transformation 8]
29. ~jumps(X0) | great_shooter(X0) [cnf transformation 20]
30. ~great_shooter(windy) [cnf transformation 12]
31. jumps(windy) [resolution 27,28]
32. great_shooter(windy) [resolution 31,29]
33. $false [forward subsumption resolution 32,30]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_problem
% Termination reason: Refutation
